summary: Frontend-only testing completed for ALMA Machines-Outils Blog section. All 9 blog articles display correctly with bento grid layout, category badges, and reading times. Individual article pages show hero images, breadcrumb navigation, publication dates, markdown content, and related articles section. Navigation between pages works correctly. Mobile responsive design adapts well.
seed_data_creation: None - all data is static in JSON files (blogData.json, blogContent.json)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog section fully tested. 9 articles with categories: Investissement, Équipement, Région PACA, Tôlerie, Automatisation, Qualité, Revente, Découpe, Organisation. Data loaded from /public/blogData.json and /public/blogContent.json.

navigation_blog_link.details: Blog link present in navigation between 'Nos Brochures' and 'À propos' - both desktop and mobile menu

blog_page_bento_grid.details: 9 articles displayed in bento grid layout with varying card sizes (large, medium, small)

blog_page_category_badges.details: All 9 category badges displayed: Investissement, Équipement, Région PACA, Tôlerie, Automatisation, Qualité, Revente, Découpe, Organisation

blog_page_reading_time.details: Reading time displayed on all 9 article cards (3-5 min de lecture)

article_page_hero_image.details: Hero image with title overlay displays correctly on individual article pages

article_page_breadcrumb.details: Breadcrumb navigation shows: Accueil / Blog / [Category] - all links functional

article_page_date_reading_time.details: Publication date (e.g., '15 janvier 2026') and reading time displayed correctly

article_page_markdown_content.details: Markdown content renders correctly with headings, paragraphs, bold text, blockquotes

article_page_related_articles.details: 'Articles similaires' section displays 3 related articles with category badges and reading times

navigation_between_pages.details: All navigation links work: Blog link, article cards, breadcrumbs, 'Retour au blog' button, related articles

responsive_mobile.details: Mobile hamburger menu shows Blog link, blog page adapts to mobile viewport, article cards stack vertically
